snippet.title: Dhamaka | Official Teaser | Kartik Aaryan | Ram Madhvani | Netflix India
snippet.description:
Sometimes all it takes is one phone call to change lives.

A frustrated ex-news anchor is given another chance to go live on prime time television when a terrorist calls him with a bomb threat. Little does he know that this call will change his life and throw him into a fast-paced game of betrayal.

Catch Kartik Aaryan in an intense, never seen before avatar, in Dhamaka, coming soon on Netflix.

A Netflix Original film 
RSVP and Ram Madhvani Films present 
In association with 
Lotte Cultureworks, Global Gate Entertainment 

Directed by Ram Madhvani
Producers: Ronnie Screwvala, Amita Madhvani & Ram Madhvani

Executive Producer: Rhea Prabhu, Sia Bhuyan
Associate Producer: Sushmita Yadav
DOP: Manu Anand
Writer: Puneet Sharma
VFX Director: Biju Dhanapalan 
Editors: Monisha Baldawa, Amit Karia
Action Director: Manohar Verma
Line Producer: Sumit Kumar
Associate Directors: Kayoze Irani, Shraddha Pasi
First AD: Paarth Joshi
Costume Stylist: Theia Tekchandaney
Production Designers: Nidhi Rungta, Richard Viagulam
Sound Recordist: Bhabani Mallick
HMU Stylist: Jay Kanojia

Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2Oufg8z

snippet.title: Kevin O’Brien's record century against England in famous World Cup win | #CWC11Rewind
snippet.description:
Ireland produced one of the biggest shocks in world cup history as they overcame England in Bengaluru. 

After being set an imposing target of 328 by England, as Jonathan Trott (92) narrowly missed out on a World Cup century & right-arm seamer John Mooney returned excellent figures of 4/63. 

Ireland’s run chase got off to the worst possible start as they lost captain William Porterfield to the first ball of the innings. And it wouldn’t be until the loss of Ireland’s 5th wicket that their run-chase started to pick up serious momentum. As the pair of Kevin O’Brien and Alex Cusack put on a remarkable 162 runs for the 6th wicket partnership, a World Cup record stand.

That wouldn’t be the only record to be broken as Kevin O’Brien’s herculean 100 off just 50 balls became the fastest World Cup century in the tournament's history. Guiding Ireland to the brink of victory O’Brien finally fell, leaving the winning moment to John Mooney as his boundary sealed victory for Ireland and sparked scenes of jubilation. 

A true World Cup classic and quite possibly the biggest shock in the tournament's history. A famous Irish victory ☘️

Join us to celebrate 10 years since the iconic 2011 Men’s Cricket World Cup. A festival of cricket featuring some of the biggest sixes, greatest wickets, and a countless number of moments that inspired a generation.

Follow #CWC11Rewind across all our digital and social platforms up until 2nd April.

On our Website: https://www.icc-cricket.com/
On Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/icc 
On Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/icc/
On Twitter: https://twitter.com/ICC

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Episode 583 | 1st March, 2021
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Episode 583: Popatlal Gives A Shock
-------------------------------------
Bhide and Madhavi are still in their dreamland, where they are rich and affluent. Meanwhile, at Abdul's soda shop, Popatlal informs everyone about the rampant email frauds taking place these days.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.
tags: Tarak Mehta ka ooltah chashmah funniest episode ever

snippet.title: Flight: Official Trailer | Mohit C | Suraj J | K Chadda | 19th March 2021 | Reliance Ent, UFO Moviez
snippet.description:
Flight mode: ON!
Witness the ultimate #FightToSurvive in #Flight, in cinemas on 19th March 2021. 
#FlightTrailer out now!

The movie follows the journey of Ranveer Malhotra, who against all the odds, has to face deadly obstacles on a plane in order to survive.

Actors - Mohit Chadda, Pavan Malhotra, Zakir Hussain, Viveck Vaswani, Shibani Bedi, Pritam Singh
Director - Suraj Joshi
Producers - K. Chadda, Babita Ashiwal, Mohit Chadda, Suraj Joshi
Co-Producers - Rohit Chadda
Associate Producers - Tasneem Dhinojwala & Saife Vetmed Pvt. Ltd.
DOP - Deepak Pandey
Story, Screenplay, Dialogues - Babita Ashiwal, Mohit Chadda, Suraj Joshi
Film Editor - Rahul Mathur
Production Designer - Amit Pathania
Costume Designer - Shaahid Amir
Action Director - Nishant Khan
Sound Design - Ganesh Gangadharan, Anuj Mathur
Re-recording Mixer - Anuj Mathur (YRF Studios)
BGM Composer - Smriti Minocha
VFX - Crazy Boyz VFX
DI - Futureworks
VFX Supervisor - Prasad Patil
Marketing Agency - Everymedia
Digital Agency - Everymedia, Syrup Tech

UFO Moviez and Reliance Entertainment have come forward to release a Crazy Boyz Entertainment production, Flight. Presented by K. Chadda and directed by Suraj Joshi, the spine-chilling action thriller is scheduled to release on 19th March 2021.

Follow us on - 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/flightthemovie
Twitter: https://twitter.com/flightthemovie
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/flighthemovie/

For more information, log on:
https://www.relianceentertainment.com
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/RelianceEnt/  
Twitter: https://twitter.com/RelianceEnt 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/reliance.entertainment

snippet.title: Hardik Patel કૉંગ્રેસની હાર બાદ શું બોલ્યાં અને આગળની કામગીરી વિશે શું કહ્‌યું?
snippet.description:
ગુજરાતમાં સ્થાનિક સ્વરાજની ચૂંટણીમાં ભાજપનો ભવ્ય વિજય થયો છે. મુખ્ય વિપક્ષ કોંગ્રેસની આ ચૂંટણીમાં હાર થઈ છે. 

કૉંગ્રેસના મોટા નેતાઓના વિસ્તારમાં પણ તેમના ઉમેદવારો હારી ગયા છે.

જેથી ગુજરાત કૉંગ્રેસ પ્રમુખ અમિત ચાવડાએ રાજીનામું આપી દીધું છે. 

આ મુદ્દે કૉંગ્રેસના કાર્યકારી અધ્યક્ષ હાર્દિક પટેલે કૉંગ્રેસની હાર પર પોતાની પ્રતિક્રિયા આપી છે.
#hardikpatel #gujaratelection #gujaratcongress

તમે અમારી સાથે જોડાઈ શકો છો : 

Website : https://www.bbc.com/gujarati 
Facebook : https://bit.ly/2nRrazj 
Instagram : https://bit.ly/2oE5W7S 
Twitter : https://bit.ly/2oLSi2r 
JioChat Channel : BBC Gujarati 
Helo : BBC News ગુજરાતી 
ShareChat : bbcnewsgujarati

snippet.description:
After failing to convince his dad to fund his start-up, Abhinav gets a little mad at Jha Ji. Jha ji gets drunk at the wedding and calls Abhinav to pick him up. On the way back home in the cab, they get into a heated argument! Let’s find out if Abhinav finally is able to convince Jha Ji for a vacation in Manali? In this series finale!

snippet.title: King - Blanko | The Gorilla Bounce | Prod. by Section 8 | Latest Hit Songs 2021
snippet.description:
LYRICS:

Pre-chorus

Sach bol na jaana,
Tu mujhse door kyu hai?

Tu ek din mil jayegi,
Ye mera fitoor hai.

CHORUS

Maahi ve!
Jo tu na mila
To phir kya hua?
Teri yaadon mein
Main jeeta rahaa.

Tere naam ki
Jo bheji dua
Sach ho na saki
Main karta bhi kya

Verse 1

Maine Din bhi sudhaar liye,
Kapde bhi sawaar liye,
Abhi kitna kama rahe,
Tune chhote hi sawaal kiye.

Tera zikar chhupa liya,
Aur khudse malaal kiye,
Na soch sakoge tum
Humne itne kamaal kiye.

Afsos hota hai bas hume is baat ka,
Tum dil mein jaana kabhi nahi jhaanke.

Tum humse aisa pyaar kabhi kar na sake,
Jaisi ye duniya karti hain baatein.

Pre-chorus

Sach bol na jaana,
Tu mujhse door kyu hai?

Tu ek din mil jayegi,
Ye mera fitoor hai.

CHORUS

Maahi ve!
Jo tu na mila
To phir kya hua?
Teri yaadon mein
Main jeeta rahaa.

Tere naam ki
Jo bheji dua
Sach ho na saki
Main karta bhi kya

Verse2

Faslon mein,
Bhi raza teri.
Mushkilon mein,
Kyu wafa meri.

Main hasun na,
Khwahishein teri,
Tu roye na,
Ye dua meri.

Jo mujhse door jayegi,
To jaana toot jayegi,
Ye duniya hai khayalon ki,
Tu sach mein ruth jayegi.

Main tujhse kya chhupaunga,
Tu mujhko kya btayegi,
Tu jab bhi aankhein band karle,
Saamne mujhko payegi.

Pre-Chorus

Sach bol na jaana,
Tu mujhse door kyu hai?

Tu ek din mil jayegi,
Ye mera fitoor hai.

CHORUS

Maahi ve!
Jo tu na mila
To phir kya hua?
Teri yaadon mein
Main jeeta rahaa.

Tere naam ki
Jo bheji dua
Sach ho na saki
Main karta bhi kya - 2.T

Composed By King

snippet.description:

Episode 3113: Sunder Brings Sweets For Everyone
---------------------------------------------------------
Sunder arrives with Baka and another one of his friends at the Gada household and also brings sweets with him to celebrate the occasion of selling the plot. But Jethalal is still in a solemn mood. Jetha informs everyone of his plan to not go ahead with the sale of his plot. He explains why he came up with this change of heart and how his dream helped in changing the decision. Catch the fun and watch the full episode on SonyLIV.

More Useful Links :

 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.
tags: Jetha Reveals The Truth Of His Tension

snippet.title: The RelationShit | Anmol Sachar | Bhavika Motwani (Comedy Video)
snippet.description:
The RelationShit is a comedy video by Anmol Sachar ft Bhavika Motwani in which a boyfriend gets a video call from his annoying girlfriend who needs no reason to fight with him & picks a fight for every single thing he says. This leads to some super crazy situations & a funny conversation between the girlfriend & boyfriend who are surely experiencing pyaar ke side effects & realize that their relationship is more of a relationshit!

What happens in the end? Does the boyfriend get frustrated & speak up? Does he continue to remain silent and bear the torture because he loves his girl friend? Does the girl realize that she’s not treating him right Or is there an unexpected twist in this BF Vs GF tale?

Yeh sab pata karne ke liye video end takk zaroor dekhna! I promise you will love it!

--------------------------------------------------------------------
► Can we cross 40K LIKES on this video? Hit that LIKE button now! 

► Click the ‘Red Subscribe Button’ to become a part of my YouTube family!
You can also click this link: https://www.youtube.com/anmolsachar?sub_confirmation=1

► Which was your favourite part & dialogue? Comments mein batao!

► Don’t forget to share this video with your friends & family!

snippet.description:
Aaj main aapko aate se bilkul naye tarike se pooran poli recipe banana bataungi, woh bhi bina aata gundhe, bina bele aur bina koi mehnat kiya, ekdum asani se ban jati hai …aur itni soft ki muh mein jate hi ghul jati hai …
1 कप आटे से बनाये ढेरों सॉफ्ट पूरन पोली जो मुँह में जाते ही घुल जाये वह भी बिना आटा गुथे बिना बेले
Doston Agar ap ko meri yeah Recipe Pasand aa ye toh…LIKE and SHARE... Karna Nahi Bhule and Latest Recipe Update ke Liye.. Subscribe Karein ..and Bell Icon Press Karein…Free!
Support & Subscribe My Channel: https://goo.gl/QU4TtG
Youtube Channel: http://www.youtube.com/c/RayKitchen
Ingredient
1. Split Chickpeas (Brown ) 1/2 Cup 
2. Jaggery Powder 1Cup
3. Water 1/2 Cup + 1 Cup
4. Wheat flour 1 Cup
5. Nutmeg Pinch
6. Cardamom Powder 1/4 tsp
7. Salt as per taste
8. Turmeric Powder 1/4 tsp
9. Clarified Butter 1 tbsp

snippet.title: Gangubai Kathiawadi | Official Teaser | Sanjay Leela Bhansali, Alia Bhatt | 30th July 2021
snippet.description:
Gangubai Kathiawadi - A story, based on the book “ Mafia Queens of Mumbai” written by  S. Hussain Zaidi, is a film that celebrates the rise of a simple girl from Kathiawad who had no choice but to embrace the ways of destiny and swing it in her favour.

The narrative walks through the life of young Ganga who in no time marks her own territory and becomes Gangubai – The Matriarch of Kamathipura.

Once again, Sanjay Leela Bhansali brings to his audience a moving yet stem-winding story with power-packed performances laced in his magical musical notes.
With a promise to make one and all feel inspired in 2021 as Gangubai Kathiawadi celebrates the journey of a girl who became the voice for women empowerment.

Bhansali Productions & PEN Studios  Present
A Film by Sanjay Leela Bhansali
Produced by: Sanjay Leela Bhansali & Dr. Jayantilal Gada (Pen Studios)

In Cinemas: July 30, 2021

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Episode 732 - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Zfu1x9Bd1UqLwUxhZ1oBJh

The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

mr.title: आई, मी आणि शॉपिंग | #bhadipa
mr.description:
पुन्हा एकदा घेऊन आलो आहोत आई, अनि, जुई आणि त्यांचे मजेशीर किस्से. ह्या नवीन भागात आई शिकवत आहे अनि आणि जुईला शॉपिंग चे उपयोगी धडे. ह्या शॉपिंगच्या परीक्षेत होणार ते पास का मिळणार त्यांना मार्क शून्य? जाणून घेण्यासाठी हा व्हिडिओ शेवटपर्यंत पाहा. 
अशा काँटेंट साठी #भाडिपा ला सबस्क्राईब करा, शास्त्र असतं ते!  

श्रेयावली -
कलाकार
रेणुका दफ्तरदार
मृण्मयी गोडबोले
आलोक राजवाडे

दिग्दर्शन - ओमकार जाधव
लेखक - कौस्तुभ सोमण, सारंग साठे
सहयोगी दिग्दर्शक - सागरिका जोशी
सहाय्यक दिग्दर्शक - अभिप्राय कामठे

snippet.title: Barrister Babu | बैरिस्टर बाबू | Episode 209 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
As Anirudh is taking care of Bondita and helping her study, Bondita feels the need to know whether she is in love with Anirudh. Do Bondita's cheeks turn red at Anirudh's name? Watch this sneak peek to know more of the upcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #BarristerBabu

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

In a bid to save an 8-year-old girl from becoming the victim of Sati, Anirudh marries a curious and tyrant girl Bondita. At a time when women education was considered sinful, Anirudh educates Bondita and makes her the first “Barrister Babu” of their region. Will their imperfect marriage turn into a successful relationship? Will Anirudh succeed in his mission to gain independence for the women in his country?

snippet.title: Barrister Babu | बैरिस्टर बाबू | Episode 207 & 208 | Recap
snippet.description:
On their first day away from home, Bondita is worried as there is no toilet near their new home. So Anirudh builds a toilet for her. How will Bondita react to Anirudh's loving gesture?



#ColorsTV #BarristerBabu

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KuiLqIqTihkl0TgFPlQjmKs

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

In a bid to save an 8-year-old girl from becoming the victim of Sati, Anirudh marries a curious and tyrant girl Bondita. At a time when women education was considered sinful, Anirudh educates Bondita and makes her the first “Barrister Babu” of their region. Will their imperfect marriage turn into a successful relationship? Will Anirudh succeed in his mission to gain independence for the women in his country?

snippet.title: Gaali Sampath Movie Trailer | Sree Vishnu | Rajendra Prasad | Anil Ravipudi | Anish Krishna | Achu
snippet.description:
Gaali Sampath Telugu Movie Trailer on Shine Screens. #GaaliSampath Latest 2021 Telugu Movie ft. Sree Vishnu, Rajendra Prasad, Lovely Singh, Tanikella Bharani and Sathya. Presented by Anil Ravipudi. Directed by Anish Krishna and Produced by S Krishna under Imagespark Entertainment in association with Shine Screens. Music composed by Achu Rajamani. Gaali Sampath movie is all set to hit the big screens on March 11th, 2021.

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1185 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Virat rescues Heer from drowning, and the long-lost love between them comes back to life. Watch the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode and find out more.
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Chakravyuh - An Inspector Virkar Crime Thriller | Official Trailer | MX Original Series | MX Player
snippet.description:
⚠️ Nothing is 100% secure!

Watch Inspector Virkar fight 'Internet ka underworld' - the dark web.

Chakravyuh - An Inspector Virkar Crime Thriller, out on 12 March. 

#ChakravyuhOnMX #MXOriginalSeries #MXPlayer

Directed by Sajit Warrier

Key Cast: Prateik Babbar, Simran Kaur Mundi, Ashish Vidyarthi, Shiv Panditt, Gopal Datt, Ruhi Singh, Karan Raj, Ayesha Kanga, Rohan Joshi, Ankit Narang, Mahir Pandi, Twinkle Tshering, Asif Basra, Anjali Sivaraman and NaghmaRizwan 

About Chakravyuh - An Inspector Virkar Crime Thriller:
When a college student gets murdered in a ghastly manner, Inspector Virkar from the Crime Branch gets called in. As Virkar investigates, he stumbles upon a ruthless gang of young, tech-savvy miscreants who use social networking sites and the dark web for blackmail and extortion. But how are the cases linked? Who is the mastermind behind these killings? As the case grows murkier, Virkar finds himself out of his depth, chasing a killer who always seems to be one step ahead. Virkar must race against time to unmask the gang and find the murderer before it’s too late.

------------------------------

snippet.description:

The police feel that his situation is vulnerable, as they suspect that his parents death was not accidental. They arrange for a full-time personal bodyguard for him by the name of Inspector Rajveer Singh. Will he Rajveer be able to protect Abbas? Watch to know more.  Watch to know more.

Following the accidental death of his parents, Abbas Khan inherits the entire wealth estate, and property. The police feel that his situation is vulnerable, as they suspect that his parents death was not accidental. They arrange for a full-time personal bodyguard for him by the name of Inspector Rajveer Singh. Will he Rajveer be able to protect Abbas? Watch to know more.  Watch to know more.

snippet.description:

Catch Siddharth Nigam in an all new avatar of a smitten lover waking up to the harsh realities of life and Rits Badiani who aces the bubbly yet ambitious love interest pulled in different directions between her head and heart.

snippet.title: Dadaji डरा गये बिचारे Jetha को -Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah -तारक मेहता -Ep 3112 -1st March,2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-s-grandfather-s-warning-1000109647?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3112: Jethalal Gets Scared
---------------------------------------------------------
Jethalal worries over Bapuji's selling off their ancestral land and goes to sleep. In mid-night, Jayantilal Gada, Jethalal's grandfather comes into his bedroom, wakes him up, and tells him that he must drop his idea of selling the precious land that they've been taking care of for long years otherwise he will never forgive him. Jetha tries to communicate but couldn't as he finds himself dreaming about his Dadaji. This scares him and he runs to Bapuji to tell him about Jayantilal Gada's presence in his room. Catch the fun and watch the full episode on SonyLiv.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.
tags: Jetha Reveals The Truth Of His Tension

Oorigobba Raaja, a scintillating party number, is all set to drive us crazy. Watch the duo Sayyeshaa Saigal and Puneeth Rajkumar burn up the dance floor. snippet.title: Sunder Ka Vaada! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा - Ep 3113
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku

Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Can she fight her fate and turn it around? watch the story unfold, now on Voot.

snippet.title: GOLI MAAR DE - Rohit Zinjurke & Nita Shilimkar | Asees Kaur | Anshul Garg |Rajat Nagpal Vicky Sandhu
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Goli Maar De sung by Asees Kaur ft. Rohit Zinjurke & Nita Shilimkar.

Stream full song here

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/goli-maar-de-2
JioSaavn: https://www.saavn.com/s/song/punjabi/Goli-Maar-De/Goli-Maar-De/AyYeUzppYAA?referrer=svn_source=share&svn_medium=com.whatsapp&utm_source=share&utm_medium=com.whatsapp
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/3jyEv2uLWWTk9K1fQuHkYT?si=XqM2bkllRxmx_ZGgt2arpA&utm_source=whatsapp
Amazon Music: https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08X4J71ZN?trackAsin=B08X4J36MM&ref=dm_sh_97ZKhC6OyKL4wWxHSxy64bBK8
Wynk Music: https://wynk.in/music/album/goli-maar-de/bl_3616553446935
Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/in/album/goli-maar-de-single/1554975645
Resso: https://m.resso.app/ZSJdh3uT9/
iTunes: https://music.apple.com/in/album/goli-maar-de-single/1554975645



Singer - Asees Kaur
Music - Rajat Nagpal
Lyrics - Vicky Sandhu
Composition- Vicky Sandhu
Recorded @ Studio 504 by Rahul Sharma Assist by Samir Dharap 
Guitars & Strokes Shomu Seal

Featuring - Rohit Zinjurke & Nita Shilimkar

Producer - Anshul Garg

Director - Rav Dhillon 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Dop - Yuvraj Indori
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
chorographer - John 
Production - Kuldeep 
Editing - Zipsi 
Colour - Onkar
Stylist - Outro by Akshita & Anulika 
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital


Lyrics :

Karda rehnda a ignore ve 
Tere moohre chalda ni zor ve 
Shelian to rakhdi lukake tenu main 
Mere bina takki na koi hor ve 
Kolo d mukh fer langde eh hunde ni Asool pyar de 
Je sade vall Takkna nai channa ve sade Goli maarde 

Jini vaari tere vall Dekha sohnya 
Tera ta dhyan mere vall howe na
Odo tk tenu kuj feel hunda na 
Jado tak tere moohre kuri rowe na 
Tu Khijea Rehna a roz ve 
Kde hass meri Jind thaarde 
J sade vall Takna ..
Je sade vall Takkna nai channa ve sade Goli maarde 

Matchinga main Kardi a Jaan jaan Ke 
Jaan bujh Notice tu Krda e nai 
Mere bina rehna a tu bada  khush ve 
Tere bina Pal Mera sarda e nai 
Vicky Sandhu Main Chaluni apni Band Kar tere gere bahar de .. 
Je sade vall Takkna nai channa ve sade Goli maarde.


#GoliMaarDe #RohitZinjurke #NitaShilimkar
